objective: Align LM Studio VLM preflight with the actual loadable model key, keep the canonical repo diagnostics intact, and verify live LM Studio /v1/chat/completions validation on the installed runtime.

details: Separated the LM Studio-visible key from the canonical Hugging Face repo in the VLM preflight script so visibility checks now use the actual loadable key `lfm2.5-vl-1.6b-mlx`.
Kept canonical repo diagnostics for the local store and model-data checks, preserving the repo-level evidence trail.
Added tests that cover the short-key visibility path and the default pass path for the preflight.
Updated the README preflight instructions to explain the key split and verified the live LM Studio chat path against the running server on port `4521`.

commands.finding: The canonical repo key is not loadable directly; LM Studio returned `Model not found` and pointed to `lms ls`.
LM Studio loaded the retained VLM successfully and exposed it as identifier `m31-lfm25-vl`.
LM Studio server started on port `4521`.
Live `/v1/chat/completions` validation passed for text and VLM image requests; the server reported `m31-lfm25-vl` and returned `A toucan.` for the retained image prompt.
Default preflight now reports `ready_for_live_validation=true` with the LM Studio-visible key.
Probe and preflight regression coverage passed.

decision.next_action: Resume retained-workload benchmark and candidate triage work now that the LM Studio visibility gate is aligned with the actual runtime key.

summary: Aligned LM Studio VLM preflight with the actual visible model key, verified the default preflight passes, and captured a passing live chat/image validation on the running LM Studio server.
